productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Simple Backpack Navy Blue Backpacks
description: Let your backpack speak your style statement, and the easiest way to do it is by donning the Simple Backpack from belkin. Laptop size: 15.6" Made of polyester One main zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and organiser space One zippered pouch on the front with design on the top Ergonomically padded back with adjustable and padded shoulder straps Haul loop for handling ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
